# STRAT.038 ? Situational Leadership (Hersey & Blanchard)

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** strategic_frameworks
**Subcategory:** leadership_frameworks
**Domain:** LEADERSHIP_FRAMEWORKS
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Match style to follower readiness; directing, coaching, supporting, delegating; competence and commitment vary; flexibility

## Application
Assess follower readiness; adapt style accordingly; directive when low readiness; delegate when high; develop through stages

## Key Values
- Flexibility
- Readiness assessment
- Style adaptation
- Development focus
- Context sensitivity

## Tags
philosophy, strategic-framework, leadership_frameworks

## Notes
Strategic framework ingested into philosophy library per operator mapping rule.
